nodes.title: Scientific Method Policy Tree
nodes.excerpt: Canonical hub for falsifiability, measurement policy, reproducibility, and predictable system development.
nodes.bodyMD:
This tree links ideology roots to measurable development policy: claims must be testable, measurements must be governable, disagreement must route through proofs, and outputs must stay reproducible.

Minimal artifact: testable-claim map + measurement policy register + reproducibility controls + uncertainty register.
nodes.summary: Canonical hub for falsifiability, measurement policy, reproducibility, and predictable system development.

nodes.title: Method Cycle Policy
nodes.excerpt: Operational loop: claim -> test -> falsify or strengthen -> revise.
nodes.bodyMD: Policy requirement: every material claim ships with observables, error bounds, and explicit invalidators. Decisions are revisable by new evidence, not protected by status.
nodes.summary: Operational loop: claim -> test -> falsify or strengthen -> revise.

nodes.title: Truth Convergence Pathways
nodes.excerpt: Plural inquiry converges where evidence stabilizes across observers.
nodes.bodyMD: Scientific-method policy anchor in ideology: many hypotheses are allowed, but convergence is evidence-driven and reproducible.
nodes.summary: Plural inquiry converges where evidence stabilizes across observers.

nodes.title: Verification Checklist
nodes.excerpt: Claims require measurable checks, falsifiers, and response plans.
nodes.bodyMD: Verification is the minimum contract for non-propaganda reasoning.
nodes.summary: Claims require measurable checks, falsifiers, and response plans.

nodes.title: Reproducibility Controls
nodes.excerpt: Traceability and liveness controls keep claims replayable.
nodes.bodyMD: Reproducibility policy requires provenance, live-source checks, and feedback loop hygiene so results can be independently reconstructed.
nodes.summary: Traceability and liveness controls keep claims replayable.

nodes.title: Provenance Protocol
nodes.excerpt: Claims carry source lineage.
nodes.bodyMD: Source lineage is mandatory for reproducibility audits.
nodes.summary: Claims carry source lineage.

nodes.title: Liveness Or It Didnt Happen
nodes.excerpt: Stale evidence is not evidence.
nodes.bodyMD: Time-sensitive claims require liveness checks to stay valid.
nodes.summary: Stale evidence is not evidence.

nodes.title: Feedback Loop Hygiene
nodes.excerpt: Close loops only on verified signals.
nodes.bodyMD: Feedback routing must avoid self-reinforcing rumor loops.
nodes.summary: Close loops only on verified signals.

nodes.title: Measurement Governance
nodes.excerpt: Metrics are bounded by legitimacy and anti-coercion rules.
nodes.bodyMD: Measurement policy aligns observables, public explanation, and ethical limits so optimization does not become predation.
nodes.summary: Metrics are bounded by legitimacy and anti-coercion rules.

nodes.title: Metric Integrity Guardrail
nodes.excerpt: Metrics need explicit invalidators and review triggers.
nodes.bodyMD: Headline counts alone are not proof; metric definitions must be auditable.
nodes.summary: Metrics need explicit invalidators and review triggers.

nodes.title: Civic Signal Loop
nodes.excerpt: Listening inputs route into measurable action and correction.
nodes.bodyMD: Societal observables are meaningful only when they produce accountable updates.
nodes.summary: Listening inputs route into measurable action and correction.

nodes.title: Right Speech Infrastructure
nodes.excerpt: Public communication includes uncertainty and corrections.
nodes.bodyMD: Measurement outputs must be communicated without propaganda certainty.
nodes.summary: Public communication includes uncertainty and corrections.

nodes.title: Three Tenets Loop
nodes.excerpt: Not-knowing, witness, action maps directly to disciplined inquiry.
nodes.bodyMD: This loop provides the behavioral policy around scientific uncertainty.
nodes.summary: Not-knowing, witness, action maps directly to disciplined inquiry.

nodes.title: Citizens Arc Convergence Compact
nodes.excerpt: Disagreement is routed into proof literacy, not punishment.
nodes.bodyMD: Contestability is a core policy for durable shared truth.
nodes.summary: Disagreement is routed into proof literacy, not punishment.

nodes.title: Uncertainty Discipline
nodes.excerpt: Predictability requires explicit uncertainty handling at every stage.
nodes.bodyMD: Policy requires certainty grading, uncertainty registers, and bounded claims across runtime and science workflows.
nodes.summary: Predictability requires explicit uncertainty handling at every stage.

nodes.title: Degree of Certainty Framework
nodes.excerpt: Confidence is graded with explicit gates.
nodes.bodyMD: Certainty gates ensure claims carry confidence, coverage, and uncertainty annotations.
nodes.summary: Confidence is graded with explicit gates.

nodes.title: Uncertainty Mechanics Stack
nodes.excerpt: Classical, statistical, and quantum uncertainty pathways.
nodes.bodyMD: Development predictability depends on structured uncertainty propagation.
nodes.summary: Classical, statistical, and quantum uncertainty pathways.

nodes.title: Uncertainty Register
nodes.excerpt: Unsupported or partial claims are explicitly recorded.
nodes.bodyMD: Unknowns are first-class outputs, not hidden residuals.
nodes.summary: Unsupported or partial claims are explicitly recorded.

nodes.title: Applicability Map
nodes.excerpt: Where scientific-method policy is applied in active systems.
nodes.bodyMD: This map points to runtime systems where reproducibility and predictability are actively solved for through contracts, traces, and verification flows.
nodes.summary: Where scientific-method policy is applied in active systems.

nodes.title: Helix Ask Certainty Stack
nodes.excerpt: Runtime certainty gates for answer quality and confidence.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied certainty policy in inference-time routing and validation.
nodes.summary: Runtime certainty gates for answer quality and confidence.

nodes.title: Pipeline Ledger Tree
nodes.excerpt: Pipeline calculations and ledger reporting tied to verification.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied verification policy for pipeline-to-ledger coherence.
nodes.summary: Pipeline calculations and ledger reporting tied to verification.

nodes.title: Trace System Tree
nodes.excerpt: Trace evidence and replayability policy.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied reproducibility and auditability in trace collection and replay.
nodes.summary: Trace evidence and replayability policy.

nodes.title: UI Backend Binding Tree
nodes.excerpt: Verification outputs surfaced in user-facing interfaces.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied measurement policy from backend evidence to UI artifacts.
nodes.summary: Verification outputs surfaced in user-facing interfaces.

nodes.title: Simulation Systems Tree
nodes.excerpt: Simulation contracts with verification anchors.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied scientific-method controls in simulation streaming, APIs, and UI surfaces.
nodes.summary: Simulation contracts with verification anchors.

nodes.title: Resonance Tree
nodes.excerpt: Resonance workflows linked to verification contracts.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied verification anchors across resonance engine, IO, and tests.
nodes.summary: Resonance workflows linked to verification contracts.

nodes.title: Warp Mechanics Tree
nodes.excerpt: Constraint-checked warp development with verification anchors.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied predictability and verification in warp-control and viability pipelines.
nodes.summary: Constraint-checked warp development with verification anchors.

nodes.title: Physics Foundations Tree
nodes.excerpt: Foundational GR and numerical checks linked to verification.
nodes.bodyMD: Applied scientific method in foundational physics assumptions, tests, and constraints.
nodes.summary: Foundational GR and numerical checks linked to verification.

nodes.title: Verification-Based Diplomacy
nodes.excerpt: Low-trust coordination uses verification over rhetoric.
nodes.bodyMD: Scientific-method policy extends to geopolitical coordination when trust is low.
nodes.summary: Low-trust coordination uses verification over rhetoric.
